name: California Oranges Jubilee
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a 2-ounce ice cream scoop, scoop ice cream into 8 balls. Roll in coconut and freeze until ready to serve.
2. Cut the peel from oranges, removing all white membrane. Separate oranges into segments over a bowl, reserving juice.
3. Place orange segments in a second bowl. Add enough orange juice to reserved juice to make 1 cup.
4. In a 10-inch skillet, combine sugar, cloves, orange juice and 3/4 cup water. Bring to boiling.
5. Lower heat to medium-low; simmer for 15 minutes. Discard cloves.
6. Blend cornstarch with remaining 1/4 cup water in a small bowl until smooth. Stir into hot orange juice mixture.
7. Cook, stirring, until mixture comes to boiling, about 10 minutes.
8. Lower heat; boil gently for 30 seconds. Add orange segments; heat through.
9. Carefully add brandy. Heat for 30 seconds.
10. Remove ice cream "snowballs" from freezer. Place in heatproof dessert bowls.
11. Spoon hot sauce over.
